sections.label: New Features
items: RAG-powered SEC filing search — indexes 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K filings into pgvector for AI-searchable context
Filing indexing pipeline: EDGAR fetch, section parsing, chunking, OpenAI embeddings, pgvector storage
AI Analysis chat now uses tool-use to search indexed filings for relevant context
Filing index status banner on AI Analysis tab with one-click indexing

items: Value Screener improvements and expanded AI Analysis capabilities
